introSection: Loco Loco is an E&F Miler Industries steel kiddie roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Blue Bayou Dixie Landin' in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, USA.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The front car is modeled to look like a tractor, and the rest look like minecarts.

fullText:
Loco Loco is an E&F Miler Industries steel kiddie roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Blue Bayou Dixie Landin' in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, USA.



The front car is modeled to look like a tractor, and the rest look like minecarts.
